title: Bert's June 2022 Dividend Income Summary
text: We received $2,818.44 in June dividend income. This was a 21.79% year over year increase. Individual dividend growth stocks paid us $1,686.78. This represented 60% of the total dividend income received. ETFs and mutual funds accounted for 40% of our total dividend income for the month.

title: UPS Releases 2Q 2022 Earnings
text: MISSISSAUGA, Ontario, July 27, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- UPS (NYSE:UPS) today announced second-quarter 2022 consolidated revenues of $24.8 billion, a 5.7% increase over the second quarter of 2021. Consolidated operating profit was $3.5 billion, up 8.5% compared to the second quarter of 2021, and up 9.3% on an adjusted basis. Diluted earnings per share was $3.25 for the quarter; adjusted diluted earnings per share of $3.29 was 7.5% above the same period in 2021.

title: Why UPS Stock Declined Despite Q2 Earnings & Revenue Beat

title: UPS shares drop sharply despite decent Q2 results
text: UPS Inc. on Tuesday reported second-quarter results that, on balance, came in better than expected. However, the results couldn't keep shares from falling sharply amid broad equity market weakness.

title: UPS stock falls as volumes dropped, while raised pricing helped drive earnings beat

title: Africa-focused gold miner Perseus ups gold production 50% to 494,014 ounces in FY2022
text: (Kitco News) - Perseus Mining (TSX: PRU) announced today that for the financial year ended 30 June 2022 (FY2022), its gold production was 494,014 ounces, which is an increase of 50% compared to 328,632 ounces in FY2021.

title: United Parcel Service (UPS) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates

title: UPS stock rallies after profit and revenue beat expectations, share buyback target raised by about 50%
text: Shares of United Parcel Service Inc. UPS, -0.04% rallied 1.2% in premarket trading Tuesday, after the package delivery giant reported second-quarter profit and revenue that rose above expectations and boosted its stock buyback plan by about 50%. Net income rose to $2.85 billion, or $3.25 a share, from $2.68 billion, or $3.05 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: UPS posts rise in quarterly adjusted profit
text: United Parcel Service Inc on Tuesday reported a higher quarterly adjusted profit on the back of lucrative deliveries, offsetting a decline in e-commerce volumes.

title: Shoe Zone ups profit forecast on stronger-than-expected trading
text: Shoe Zone PLC (AIM:SHOE) has raised its full-year profit guidance as a results of better-than-expected trading in recent weeks.  The shoe retailer said it has seen higher-than-expected demand for summer products, particularly in the last two weeks, adding that its margins are improving as a result of good supply chain and cost management.

title: Franchise Brands ups dividend 50% after 'buoyant' first half
text: Franchise Brands raised its interim dividend by 50% as it hailed buoyant trading in the first six months of 2022. Revenues rose by 60% to £44.5mln, underlying profits (EBITDA) were 74% higher at £7.3mln and pre-tax profits up by 83% to £4.8mln.

title: UPS: The Fall Is Not Over
text: UPS stock has outperformed the market year-to-date, given its defensive profile. It also performed remarkably for its investors over the past five years. However, we believe UPS could significantly underperform moving forward. Its growth is expected to normalize, despite having robust margins.
